untranslatable_reason: Signal requires options-specific metrics (open-buy put-call ratio, strike-to-spot ratio, OTM moneyness levels) which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators contain only equity price/volume/technical indicators, not options market data. The predictive coefficient (-44.7 bps) and statistical significance (t=-29.6) cannot be directly translated without access to the underlying put-call ratio calculation.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using vol_ratio_20 as a volatility-based alternative, but this does not capture the options order flow sentiment that is core to the signal. The signal's edge depends on options customer behavior data (discount broker vs. full-service broker customers) which is fundamentally unavailable. Original source text confirms the signal is based on open-buy volume from options customers, not price action.
